news.t: Better Value, Bigger Growth: HEI, TDG Top BWX Technologies Stock

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg International Treasury Bond ETF (BWX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment-grade, fixed-rate government bonds issued by countries outside the US. BWX was launched on Oct 2, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Bloomberg Global Treasury x US Capped (Inception 8/31/2007)
